articles.title: What ClickUp’s mass layoff tells us about the future of work
articles.summary: The nine-year-old startup is replacing hundreds of employees with thousands of AI agents.

articles.title: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
articles.summary: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose older problems: concentrated power, eroding democracy, and a tech elite that shapes the world to its own advantage.

articles.title: 马矿股份：一矿独大、9成收入来自福建，三年分红12亿现欲再募10亿｜IPO观察
articles.summary: 马矿股份营收超九成来自铁精粉，生产经营仅依靠单座矿山，同时客户结构集中，超八成收入来自前五大客户，近九成营收来自福建地区，产品、资源、客户及区域多重集中风险叠加，未来成长性饱受质疑。

articles.title: Huawei Presents the Tau (τ) Scaling Law, Enabling Breakthroughs in Transistor Density and System Performance
articles.summary: By 2031, the high-end chips Huawei designs based on the τ Scaling Law are expected to feature a transistor density that is equivalent to 14 Å (1.4 nm) processes.

articles.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
articles.summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.

articles.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
articles.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
